backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining analysis data types (AnalysisDirection, CandlestickPattern, ResistanceLevel, AnalysisResult), user settings, and functions to store/retrieve analyses and settings per user principal, including Gemini API key management and blob storage mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four features related to API key validation, Pocket Option mobile screenshot handling, enhanced logging for mobile uploads, and early API key validation in the processing screen.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend source files describing component functionality, Portuguese translations, API key configuration UI, camera capture, file upload with HEIC rejection, processing stages, signal display, and chart overlay rendering.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining colors for UI elements like background, foreground, primary, secondary, destructive, borders, charts, and sidebar components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with viewport meta tag, Portuguese language attribute set to 'en', title 'Advance Signal Pro', and root div mounting the React application from main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component configuring TanStack Router with routes for dashboard, analyze, processing, results, history, and settings pages, all wrapped in ThemeProvider and Layout component.
frontend/src/components/CameraCapture.ts: Camera capture component using custom useCamera hook with Portuguese UI text, supporting photo capture, retake, camera switching, and error handling for permission, not-found, and not-supported scenarios.
frontend/src/components/ChartOverlay.tsx: Canvas-based overlay component that draws support/resistance levels as dashed blue lines, trend arrows (green for bullish, red for bearish), and price labels on top of the uploaded chart image.
frontend/src/components/FileUpload.tsx: File upload component with drag-and-drop support that validates image formats (PNG, JPG, JPEG, WebP), rejects HEIC files, and enforces a 10MB size limit.
Displays a single analysis result in the history list with signal badge (COMPRA/VENDA/SEM ENTRADA/NEUTRO), confidence percentage, timestamp, and trend direction; navigates to results page on click.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper component that renders the page outlet, toast notifications, and a footer with caffeine.ai attribution.
Displays a single processing stage indicator with three states: pending (dot), active (spinning loader), or complete (checkmark).
frontend/src/components/SettingRow.tsx: Reusable settings row component that displays a label, description, and control element in a horizontal layout.
frontend/src/components/SignalCard.tsx: Displays the main analysis signal card with direction (COMPRA/VENDA/MANTER/SEM ENTRADA/NEUTRO), confidence percentage, trend strength, and optional score with color-coded styling.
frontend/src/config/apiConfig.ts: Defines AI provider configuration types and documents the mandatory 6-step technical analysis process including candle reading, trend identification, pattern detection, and scoring system; includes detailed Google Gemini API setup instructions.
frontend/src/context/ThemeContext.tsx: React context provider for managing light/dark theme state with localStorage persistence and automatic document class application.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, invalidating dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipboard.ts: Hook that listens for paste events to detect clipboard images and checks clipboard permissions, returning any pasted image file and permission errors.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity storage, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating analysis results and user settings, using the backend actor for data operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useSettings.ts: Wraps useGetSettings and useUpdateSettings queries into a simplified hook that exposes settings data, loading state, and an update function.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes, base styles for typography and form elements, and utility classes for touch targets.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the root component wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider for state management and authentication.
frontend/src/pages/AnalyzeChart.tsx: Page component for uploading or capturing chart images via file upload, camera, or clipboard, then navigating to the processing screen with the selected image.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying app branding, AI status indicator, and navigation buttons to analyze charts, view history, and access settings.
frontend/src/pages/History.tsx: Displays a list of previous chart analyses fetched from the backend, with loading and empty states, and navigation back to dashboard or analyze page.
frontend/src/pages/ProcessingScreen.tsx: Handles chart image processing by validating API keys, displaying animated processing stages, calling the analysis API, and storing results before navigating to the result page.
frontend/src/pages/Results.tsx: Results page component that displays trading signal analysis results including confidence, trend direction, patterns, and technical explanations with support for special states like 'SEM ENTRADA' and 'NEUTRO'. Includes share and save functionality, chart overlay, and navigation back to home.
frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx: Settings page component for configuring Gemini API key, theme (dark/light), AI sensitivity, default timeframe, and signal notifications. Handles API key validation, storage, and retrieval through the actor backend.
frontend/src/services/analysisApi.ts: API service for chart analysis that handles image preprocessing (resize, format conversion, HEIC detection), Pocket Option broker detection, API key validation, and communication with external AI providers (Gemini/OpenAI) with retry logic and error handling.
frontend/src/types/apiTypes.ts: TypeScript type definitions for external API responses implementing a 6-step objective rule-based technical analysis process with signal types (COMPRA/VENDA/NEUTRO/SEM ENTRADA), trend, confidence, patterns, and scoring system.
frontend/src/utils/formatTimestamp.ts: Utility function that converts bigint nanosecond timestamps to human-readable Portuguese date/time format (e.g., '15 de Jan de 2024 às 14:30').
frontend/src/utils/mapApiResponse.ts: Maps external API analysis responses to internal AnalysisResult format, converting signal types, trend directions, pattern strings to enums, and generating mock resistance levels while preserving original signal data.
frontend/src/utils/shareAnalysis.ts: Utility for sharing analysis results using native Web Share API or clipboard fallback, formatting signal, confidence, trend, and strength data into Portuguese text.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system, container settings, spacing, shadows, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state file defining Advance Signal Pro, a mobile app for automated financial chart analysis using external AI REST API for binary options trading on Pocket Option. Tracks 15 implemented features including dashboard, chart upload, AI processing animation, results display, history, settings, theme support, and Portuguese localization, with a known issue regarding API key configuration for mobile screenshots.
